narrative:
Precinct Lawrence #1/Zoar (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 679 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
